errors.validation_failed: The submitted value did not pass validation.
errors.request_payload_too_large: The request payload is too large.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
errors.internal_server_error: The server could not complete the operation.
errors.database_error: Database operation failed. Please try again later.
errors.endpoint_method_not_allowed: This API endpoint does not allow the request method.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
errors.network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.request_timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.auth_setup_required: The system has not been initialized.
errors.auth_setup_already_completed: The system has already been initialized.
errors.auth_password_policy_failed: The password does not meet the security policy.
errors.auth_credentials_failed: The username or password is incorrect.
errors.auth_token_expired: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.auth_token_invalid: Your session is invalid. Sign in again.
errors.auth_session_not_found: The session does not exist or is no longer active.
errors.auth_csrf_missing: Security verification is missing. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.auth_csrf_invalid: Security verification failed. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this operation.
errors.external_auth_provider_not_found: External authentication provider was not found.
errors.external_auth_provider_misconfigured: External authentication provider is not configured correctly.
errors.external_auth_state_invalid: External authentication state is invalid. Start the sign-in again.
errors.external_auth_state_expired: External authentication state expired. Start the sign-in again.
errors.external_auth_identity_conflict: This external identity is already linked to another account.
errors.mail_delivery_failed: Failed to send email. Please try again later.
errors.mail_outbox_not_found: Mail outbox record was not found.
errors.config_read_only: System configuration cannot be deleted or edited directly.
errors.config_validation_failed: Configuration value did not pass validation.
errors.config_action_invalid: Configuration action is not valid for this target.
errors.task_invalid_state: Task state does not allow this operation.
errors.task_lease_conflict: Task is being processed by another worker.
errors.minecraft_profile_name_taken: Minecraft profile name is already taken.
errors.minecraft_profile_limit_exceeded: Minecraft profile limit has been reached.
errors.minecraft_profile_delete_forbidden: This Minecraft profile cannot be deleted.
errors.minecraft_texture_upload_disabled: Uploading this texture type is disabled.
errors.minecraft_texture_unsupported_mime: Only PNG texture files are supported.
errors.wardrobe_texture_type_mismatch: Wardrobe texture type does not match the target slot.
errors.wardrobe_texture_delete_conflict: Wardrobe texture cannot be deleted right now.
errors.avatar_not_found: Avatar was not found or has been removed.
errors.avatar_file_required: Choose an avatar file to upload.
errors.avatar_upload_read_failed: Avatar upload could not be read. Choose the file again.
errors.avatar_empty_image: Avatar image could not be recognized or is empty.
errors.avatar_source_invalid: Avatar source is invalid. Use the upload button for uploaded avatars.
errors.avatar_render_failed: Avatar could not be generated. Try another image.
errors.avatar_output_invalid: Avatar output was invalid. Try another image.
